# United Against Nuclear Iran (UANI) published an "Iran War Shipping Update" on April 29, 2026, detailing Iran's sanctions evasion tactics amid ongoing conflict

## Overview
**United Against Nuclear Iran (UANI) published an "Iran War Shipping Update" on April 29, 2026, detailing Iran's sanctions evasion tactics amid ongoing conflict.** The report highlights how elevated sanctions evasion costs remain deterring large shipments and pressuring Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.[2] It advocates for these measures to compel Iran toward a negotiated settlement with American demands.[2] No UANI reports on Iran sanctions evasion, nuclear program, IRGC activities, or designations have appeared in the past hour as of 8 PM UTC on April 30, 2026.[1][2]

## Source Provenance
Primary URL: https://www.opensanctions.org/entities/NK-nq68oAyhLJDTxPnYfQq8Vg/

This entry tracks reporting from the **twitter-uani** source pipeline. The bucket-3 collection run captured this item via the Perplexity Sonar `day` recency filter inside the operational window between 2026-04-30T18:51:05Z and 2026-04-30T19:51:05Z.
